mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.title, p.slug, p.summary, p.cover_image, p.type, p.event_date, p.status, p.view_count, p.created_at, p.published_at, p.category_id FROM post p LEFT JOIN post_tag pt ON pt.post_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tag t ON t.id = pt.tag_id WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 AND p.type = 'blog'
AND t.slug = #{tagSlug}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM category c WHERE c.id = p.category_id AND c.slug = #{categorySlug} )
AND MATCH(p.title, p.content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)
ORDER BY p.published_at DESC

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.slug, p.summary, p.cover_image, p.type, p.event_date, p.status, p.view_count, p.created_at, p.published_at, p.category_id FROM post p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 AND p.type = 'ai_timeline' ORDER BY p.event_date DESC
